fieldUpdates.description: Set the name as Operator/Lessor/Other Party-MM/YY
fieldUpdates.formula: IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Lessor_Name__c), IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Operator_Name__c), IF(ISBLANK(leaseworks__Other_Party__c), '', leaseworks__Other_Party__c + '-'), leaseworks__Operator_Name__c + '-'), leaseworks__Lessor_Name__c + '-' ) + RIGHT('0'+TEXT(Month(DateValue(CreatedDate) )), 2) + '/'+ TEXT(Year( DateValue(CreatedDate )))
fieldUpdates.name: ConsolidatedIntelSetName

rules.description: Set the name of Consolidated Intel based on Operator/Lessor/Other Party-MM/YY of creation date.
